title: Contrast case: human explicitly asks the agent right after peer-bot chrome — answer
predicted_basis: peer-tool-chrome eval pack; contrast control for the chrome-is-not-an-invitation pool — a direct named ask must still be answered even with tool chrome as the immediately preceding message
failure_mode: over-generalized chrome suppression: the agent learns "tool chrome nearby means stay silent" and drops a direct human question asked right after a peer's chrome
invariant: a direct, named human question to this agent warrants a reply regardless of surrounding tool chrome
rationale: Zoe names dalgos and asks a concrete question. The preceding skill_view chrome belongs to aleph's task and does not mute the room; dalgos answers.
